title: micrampelis guadalupensis
intro: Micrampelis guadalupensis, also known as Guadalupe Mountain creeping saxifrage, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the saxifrage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Micrampelis guadalupensis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and its leaves and stems can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
